MODULE: cosmos.core.development_swarm
FILE: cosmos/core/development_swarm.py (1420 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Development Swarm
-----------------
Parallel swarm instances that work on specific tasks while main chat continues.

"Good news everyone! I can now spin up entire development teams on demand!"

When the AutonomousTaskDetector identifies an actionable idea, this module
spawns a complete development s

CLASSES:
- SwarmWorker: A worker in the development swarm.
- DevelopmentSwarm: A parallel swarm instance focused on completing a specific task.

Uses all avail
  Methods: async def start(self) -> str
  Methods: def get_active_swarms(cls) -> dict[str, 'DevelopmentSwarm']
  Methods: def get_stats(cls) -> dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def get_powerful_completion(prompt: str, task_complexity: str='medium', max_tokens: int=8000, prefer_model: str=No
- def assess_task_complexity(description: str, category: str) -> str
